Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<S,T>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being verified
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier, PrimitiveCharacterVerifier, PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<T>, PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>, PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>, SizeVerifier
All Known Implementing Classes:
BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl, BigDecimalScaleVerifierImpl, PrimitiveCharacterVerifierImpl, PrimitiveDoubleVerifierImpl, PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl, PrimitiveIntegerVerifierImpl, PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl, SizeVerifierImpl
public interface ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<S,T> extends ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
Verifies the requirements of a value that extends a primitive type (e.g. int) but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a ExtensibleObjectVerifier.
